title: eumachia insidens subsp. liberica
intro: Eumachia insidens subsp. liberica, also known as Liberian eumachia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eumachia insidens subsp. liberica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Eumachia insidens subsp. liberica is often prepared as a tea or infusion by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the leaves.
